senior_eunuch.name: Senior Eunuch Li
senior_eunuch.desc: Grants +10 coins and may soften a blow from a wrong choice.

fellow_maid.name: Ming Yue
fellow_maid.desc: Boosts compassion and buffs your beauty.

noble_lady.name: Consort Chu
noble_lady.desc: Ally of the Empress and adept with herbal medicines.

empress.name: Empress
empress.desc: The most powerful woman in the palace. She will keep you safe.

none.name: No Alliance
none.desc: You trust no one. Conserve energy and food.
